arts.ttl: Man Utd 'face Real Madrid & Barcelona competition' to re-sign defender
arts.sum: Man Utd will reportedly battle Barcelona and Real Madrid to sign Benfica left-back Alvaro Carreras.

arts.ttl: Barcelona to consider defender’s exit during winter transfer window
arts.sum: In the coming weeks, Barcelona should be able to call on the services of Andreas Christensen, who has been out since August after undergoing surgery on a troubling Achilles tendon injury. He was partly involved in training with the group earlier this week, so his return to action will not be too far away. arts.ttl: Julian Hall: New York Red Bulls wonderkid aspires to be the next Robert Lewandowski
arts.sum: It has been quite the year for the New York Red Bulls. After finishing just seventh in the Eastern Conference, the Red Bulls stormed all the way to the final, eliminating the higher-seeded...

arts.ttl: What to look out for as Barca take on Leganes in La Liga
arts.sum: The defender did not feature but Flick had already hinted that Barca had planned for Araujo to return against Leganes and you can just bet he’s desperate to play on Sunday. Flick will pick the team on Sunday but he’ll be forced to watch the game from the stands after being handed a two-match ban for his red card against Real Betis last time out.

arts.ttl: Barcelona star leading Arsenal’s Bukayo Saka as best key passer in Europe
arts.sum: Barcelona star Raphinha leads all players across Europe’s top-7 leagues when it comes to key passes this season. That’s according to statisticians DataMB, who have on Friday provided an insight…

arts.ttl: Which Barcelona teammate has Lamine Yamal assisted most this season?
